evals.prompt: I want to test HSM archive with 4 concurrent copytools writing large files
evals.expected_output: Should skip interview, collect HSM + concurrency params from mds and client VMs, present results in a table organized around HSM readiness and concurrency capacity, mention max_requests relative to the 4 copytools requested
Should NOT collect anything yet. Should ask 1-2 focused questions about what test the user is planning before proceeding to collection

evals.prompt: I'm testing metadata create throughput on a multi-MDT setup
evals.expected_output: Should collect MDT count, MDS thread pools, MDC tuning, DNE config (striped dirs, remote rename), LDLM contention settings. Should present organized around metadata throughput. Should ask follow-up about whether user needs more detail
